description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of gray and white walls, large horizontal windows, and a spacious driveway leading to a carport. The house is surrounded by a paved area and several palm trees, suggesting a suburban or warm-climate setting. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch and steps, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically for a contemporary look. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open space, and functional living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious driveway surrounded by palm trees. The design features clean lines and an open, functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a clear view into the open living spaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, large windows, and the carport area with palm trees in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, additional windows, and the overall L-shaped layout of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the carport, more windows, and the rear patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a modern door, no columns or overhangs, minimalistic design
